Greetings ♥, I'm Sumedh,
As a security analyst with 15+ months of experience in a Security Operation Center, I am passionate about Cyber Security and have a successful track record in Incident Response, Malware Analysis, Digital Forensics, and Network Penetration Testing.

EXPERIENCEs:

CryptoGen Nepal Pvt. Ltd.
◉ Role :
Associate Defensive Security Analyst


◉ Tenure : 13th February 2022 - 16th September 2022

◉ Accomplishment :

○ Hands-on with Enterprise and Open-Source SIEM Solutions.

○ Knowledge on SOC Analyst workflow and procedure.

○ Experience on Real-time SOC monitoring during Projects.

○ Experience on Practical implementation of Digital Forensics for Projects.

○ Experience on Pratical implementation of Incident Response for Projects.



Muktinath Bikas Bank Limited.
◉ Role :

Information Security Analyst.

◉ Tenure : 18th September 2022 - Ongoing

◉ Accomplishment :

○ Hands-on with Enterprise and Open-Source SIEM Solutions.

○ Knowledge on SOC Analyst workflow and procedure.

○ Experience on Real-time SOC monitoring during Projects.

○ Experience on Practical implementation of Digital Forensics for Projects.

○ Experience on Pratical implementation of Incident Response for Projects.

I am excited to bring my skills and experience to a new opportunity and to continue learning and growing in the field of cyber security.

}, "skills" : { "name" : "Skills", "content" : <>

A Vulnerability Assessment (VA) tool written in bash script ReconMe can be useful for information gathering and bug hunting, as well as for managing the attack surface of a computer system or network. This type of script can automate the process of identifying and assessing vulnerabilities, making it an efficient and effective tool for VA.

Here are few of my skills that has been listed below :



◉ SIEM (Security Information and Event Management).

◉ SOC (Security Operations Center).

◉ Network Penetration Testing.

◉ Incident Response (IR).

◉ Malware Analysis.

◉ Digital forensics and incident response (DFIR).

◉ Bash Scripting

Here are few of my Certification that I have accomplished so far :



◉ Ethical Hacking Essentials.

◉ Network Defense Essentials.

◉ NSE 1 Network Security Associate.

◉ Introduction to Vulnerability Management.

◉ Introduction to Dark Web Operations.
